name: Mary Yarborough Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cherries, pineapple, flour, and sugar in a pan.
2. Cook over medium heat until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the Jello mixture until smooth.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts and bananas.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Top with whipped cream.
7. Serve and enjoy.
